name: unifi-protect-viewer
description: Distraction-free fullscreen liveview for Unifi Protect — auto-login, session renewal, dark theme and system tray support.

scripts.build:win:x64:portable: cross-env UPV_PLATFORM=win32 UPV_ARCH=x64 UPV_PORTABLE=true node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:win:ia32:portable: cross-env UPV_PLATFORM=win32 UPV_ARCH=ia32 UPV_PORTABLE=true node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:mac:x64:portable: cross-env UPV_PLATFORM=darwin UPV_ARCH=x64 UPV_PORTABLE=true node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:mac:arm64:portable: cross-env UPV_PLATFORM=darwin UPV_ARCH=arm64 UPV_PORTABLE=true node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:linux:x64:portable: cross-env UPV_PLATFORM=linux UPV_ARCH=x64 UPV_PORTABLE=true node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:linux:arm64:portable: cross-env UPV_PLATFORM=linux UPV_ARCH=arm64 UPV_PORTABLE=true node scripts/build.js

author: Sebastian Loer
